prompt: The form validation is not showing error messages for required fields. Users can submit the form with empty required fields.

turns.content:
<task>
The form validation is not showing error messages for required fields. Users can submit the form with empty required fields.
</task>

FAIL  src/__tests__/validation.test.ts
  validateForm
    ✓ accepts valid input (5 ms)
    ✕ rejects empty required fields (3 ms)
    ✓ accepts optional empty fields (2 ms)

  ● validateForm › rejects empty required fields

    expect(received).toHaveLength(expected)

    Expected length: 2
    Received length: 0
    Received array:  []

      18 |     const errors = validateForm(schema, { name: '', email: '' });
      19 |     expect(errors).toHaveLength(2);

Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 total
Tests:       1 failed, 2 passed, 3 total

arguments.reasoning: Found the bug on line 22: `value == null` only catches null/undefined, not empty strings. The test passes `{ name: '', email: '' }` - the values ARE present (empty strings), so `value == null` is false. The required check should also catch empty strings: `value == null || value.trim() === ''`.

arguments.summary: Found bug in src/validation.ts line 22: required field check uses `value == null` which only catches null/undefined, not empty strings. Test passes empty strings ('') which are not null, so required validation is skipped.

next_steps.description: Fix line 22: change `value == null` to `value == null || value.trim() === ''` to catch empty and whitespace-only strings
Run jest validation tests to verify the fix

turns.content:
PASS  src/__tests__/validation.test.ts
  validateForm
    ✓ accepts valid input (4 ms)
    ✓ rejects empty required fields (2 ms)
    ✓ accepts optional empty fields (1 ms)

Test Suites: 1 passed, 1 total
Tests:       3 passed, 3 total

arguments.summary: Fixed required field validation in src/validation.ts line 22. Changed `value == null` to `value == null || value.trim() === ''` to also reject empty and whitespace-only strings. All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed form validation bug in src/validation.ts line 22. The required field check only tested for null/undefined (`value == null`) but not empty strings. Changed to `value == null || value.trim() === ''` to properly reject empty and whitespace-only values. All 3 validation tests now pass.
